name: io.github.NickCirv/engram
description: Cached context spine for AI coding agents. Any MCP server as a 10-line plugin. 89.1% saved.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional HTTP bearer token. Auto-generated at ~/.engram/http-server.token if unset.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_MISTAKE_GUARD
environmentVariables.description: Pre-mortem warnings: '1' = warn, '2' = deny. Unset = off, zero overhead.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_ANTHROPIC_MEMORY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override path to Claude Code's Auto-Memory MEMORY.md.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_MCP_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override path to ~/.engram/mcp-providers.json (plugin MCP server declarations).

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_NO_UPDATE_CHECK
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to disable passive update notice. Auto-disabled when $CI is set.
